summary: A Go-based test runner and schema validation tool with MCP integration and Goss migration capabilities.
concerns: Build failure in tap.go due to undefined TestResult type
High volume of AI-generated test files (glm-agents) may introduce flaky or redundant tests
Deep nested directory structures for agent-generated tests add complexity
suggestions: Fix the undefined TestResul... compilation error in internal/reporter/tap
Consolidate or archive the numerous glm-agents test directories to reduce repository bloat
Verify the quality and necessity of the 782+ tests to ensure they provide actual value
